channel.title: Damienbod.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Damienbod.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Remove sign-up from Entra External ID user flows
item.description: This article shows how to remove the sign-up flow from Entra External ID user flows. This is required because SMS and Phone validation can be abused by bots to run up costs on the tenant. The bots create accounts and start a phone validation or a SMS validation which is charged to the tenant. The […] Link to article: https://damienbod.com/2026/04/20/remove-sign-up-from-entra-external-id-user-flows/
